body_txt: A boy meets a girl of his dreams , falls in love with her, is reciprocated, and all seems shiny... until The Reveal that the girl isn't quite compatible with him biologically. For example, she is an alien . Or a ghost . Or a demon . Or a six-foot praying mantis in a person-suit . Or... Either way, she is not human and that's a slight hindrance in their relationship. How exactly it plays out depends largely on the author:  Gender Flipped (completely or par tly ) variations are also included. If they stay together, Half Human Hybrids may result. Subtrope of Interspecies Romance . May be a case of Magical Girlfriend or even Action Girlfriend . A common trope in Paranormal Romance but it appears in other genres as well. See also Boy Meets Ghoul and Shapeshifting Lover .
